reviews.review_description: Loved this game played ever Night with my best friend who lives far away but ut has just stopped working for some reason

First of all, love the fact this game is free to play. I think thats the way to go for boardgames, since they are meant to be shared with friends. 

The gameplay reminds me a traditional dice-based tabletops mixed with Mario Party minigames. 

Hand-tracking is a good choice, as some elements on the map are interactable. However, while it feels natural to try reaching them with my hand, I would love to have option to use ray to reach far objects. 

Style is really cute and maps have many details, I tried to play each map with a bot to just see all the landmarks. 

Pawns are absolutely adorable! They give me a vibe of tamagotchi haha  Would love to see more of them, and I tought it would be fun to make them walk on my desk?

I do wish the pace was a bit faster, though. The three-floors map takes a bit long to finish, and during the turns I’d love to have more ways to interact with other players or plan my strategy. 

Overall, with a bit of gameplay improvement, I think this game has good potential :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your detailed feedback and thoughtful review!
We’re especially thrilled that you highlighted the hand-tracking, adorable pawns, and detailed maps these are exactly the key features we’ve been promoting, so it’s great to see you notice them.
Your suggestions about faster gameplay, a ray option for distant objects, and more player interaction are exactly the kind of improvements we’re considering for future updates.
Thanks for playing MR.TRAVELER, we’ll keep working to make the experience even more fun and engaging!

reviews.review_title: Yo, folks! Tried out MR TRAVELER today
reviews.review_description:
Gameplay: Roll the dice, move around the map, hit random events, and mini-games pop up that are just adorable. Honestly, it feels like Mario Party and The Game of Life had a baby. Silly mini-games, strategy, and little surprises at every turn all mix perfectly. 

Graphics: Landing on a landmark tile and suddenly seeing your room transform into the actual landmark in VR… that’s next-level genius. This is what Mixed Reality is all about. Unreal experience.

Verdict: At first, I didn’t expect much since it’s free and Early Access, but wow… this game’s got insane potential. This one’s perfect for gathering the family or friends this Thanksgiving. Seriously, I really hope this game gets more buzz!

developer_response.body:
"Wow, I totally agree with your review! 😄
Especially the line about "Mario Party and The Game of Life had a baby", that’s honestly the best compliment. With this game, we really wanted to bring the future of board games to life. The mini-games, strategy, and random events all mix together perfectly, making it super fun with friends. Plus, experiencing landmarks in VR as if they’re actually there is such a fresh and mind-blowing experience. Immersive Mixed Reality like this is really hard to come by.
At first, I didn’t expect much since it’s free and in Early Access, but after playing, you really feel the game’s huge potential. It’s perfect for spending quality time with family or friends, and I sincerely hope more people discover it and the buzz around it grows! 🎲✨"

reviews.review_title: Worth Playing! Just Needs More Items/Min
reviews.review_description:
ngl, the comebacks are lowkey fun. Gameplay is decent.

I’m hoping they add more content! It would be great to see more mini-games and different items updated.

Also, it would be awesome if they gave us more ways to acquire the items. The current methods feel kinda limited. Pls keep developing!

It's alright

developer_response.body:
Thanks a lot for the thoughtful feedback!
We’re really glad to hear the comeback moments were fun,  that’s exactly the kind of chaos we love too 😄

We agree that more mini-games, more items, and more ways to earn them will make the experience even better. The team is already exploring new content, so your suggestion is right on point!

Thanks for playing MR.TRAVELER, and we’ll keep building it up so it feels even more exciting each time you play!

reviews.review_title: Lovely boardgame in your living room
reviews.review_description:
Collect 4 cards to win. 

I like those minigames (and there are a lot).

Dive in with friends or play against bots.

Graphics are so great and enjoyable.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the lovely review! 🎲
We’re really happy to hear that you enjoyed the minigames and the overall board game experience. It’s great to know the graphics and living-room vibe came through as we intended.

Whether you’re playing with friends or against bots, we hope you continue to have lots of fun collecting cards and exploring all the minigames. Thanks again for your support! 🙌

reviews.review_description:
Update to dev response: 

It's nice that you're thinking about the small percentage of people who care about not aligning their avatar to gender, but there are people out here who do. Not allowing people to set their avatar as they see fit, when your game is made for online, may alienate players. I certainly won't be playing online when I can't pick a proper character. Im sure I won't be the only one to not like this choice. 


Great graphics, fun mini games and the hand tracking does pretty well overall - though there were times when grabbing for the dice ended with grabbing and raising the table. 

The overall gameplay loop is good, but when mini games launch is not really explained, is it at the end of every round, cuz I swear there were times when there were none. 
Would be good if there was a tab where you could refer to the breakdown of the game. Like why is there rock papers scissors and how does it even initiate. 
Your intro is very slow, I don't care for the meep noises from the tutorial character and having to sit through that is tedious.. it's also not great that you can't "fast forward" to having all text visible without waiting. 

The biggest issue here is the avatar creation screen.. Why is it that you can't choose between a male or female character. It would automatically make my avatar a woman and any attempt to at least make it look male ended with it looking like something im pretty sure I can't say. Why aren't the meta avatars used, or at the very least, the option to change between the two. 

Finally, the game being free is great and will ensure the talented devs get the credit they deserve with, hopefully, a large player base. But everytime I played to review this for a newspaper, I had to play with at least two screaming brats.

developer_response.body:
30-Nov

Thank you for taking the time to review our feedback. 

Regarding the avatar customization, we are currently discussing the addition of preset slots with our development team. This would allow players to quickly select their preferred styles with ease. We believe this approach will make it much faster for players to access the look they want. As for gender selection, it’s a topic that requires more careful consideration due to its complexity, so we’ll continue to think through it thoughtfully.

---------------------------

Thank you very much for your detailed feedback.

In MR. TRAVELER, each block features a unique event, and the details are written on the block itself. When it becomes your turn, the blocks are also color-coded to show which ones may be advantageous or disadvantageous.
Unlike Mario Party—where a mini-game triggers after every player rolls once—MR. TRAVELER mini-games are activated only on specific blocks, and some of them appear exclusively on certain landmark blocks.
The rock–paper–scissors mini-game is triggered when two pawns land on the same block, and the losing pawn will move one step back and lose a small amount of points.

For more detailed information about the game, please refer to the gameplay guide below.
https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/16LRalQF6jlljCI1V_ysXwVYxIB0e1CF9isyB38ikVJs/edit?usp=drive_link

We are aware that the tutorial experience can be improved, and we are actively discussing updates to make it more enjoyable.

Regarding avatar customization, our intention is not to force players into a preset that aligns with a specific gender. We aim to support a wide range of identity expression in online environments.
We did explore using Meta Avatars during early development, but due to technical limitations, we were unable to integrate them into the launch version.

Thank you again for playing our game. We hope you continue to enjoy virtual travels with friends from all around the world. Please stay tuned for future updates!

Thank you!

reviews.review_description:
Space setup is tricky—had to send my bro to the living room and redo my room mapping just to fix a wall glitch with the shop.

Mechanics are surprisingly deep and tough, but the gameplay is sick. Plus, getting to stomp on my brother made it all worth it.

developer_response.body:
Sorry about the hassle with the space setup! 🙏
Really glad to hear you still enjoyed the gameplay and sounds like defeating your brother was the highlight 😄
We’ll keep improving the experience so you can play more smoothly next time!

reviews.review_description: This weekend night, my soon-to-be 12-year-old son and I played the board game you created. Everything was wonderful, and we couldn’t stop laughing. The only thing that could be improved is the lack of Traditional Chinese support, which made the gameplay experience a bit less smooth.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for playing MR. TRAVELER with your son! We’re thrilled to hear you both had so much fun 😄. We really appreciate your feedback about Traditional Chinese support, and we’ll definitely consider adding it in future updates.

reviews.review_description:
My first reveiw ever on meta, but i love it
Amazing details, didn't play it enough it but impressed by the details

The only point is if i removed my headset the game closes and i have to reopen it

Looking forward for a lot of updates 🤩

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for leaving your very first review for our game! 🤩
We really appreciate your kind words about the details — it means a lot to us.
Regarding the issue where the game closes when the headset is removed: this happens because the internal sensor detects that the device has been taken off. If you physically cover the sensor, the game will stay active, but this is only a temporary workaround. We’ll discuss more stable and user-friendly solutions internally to improve the overall experience.
If you have any additional feedback, please feel free to share it on our Discord: www.discord.gg/mrtraveler
We look forward to bringing you even more updates! ✨

reviews.review_title: A Mario Party-style party game for VR.
reviews.review_description:
I was able to feel the fun of Mario Party in the mini-game.
If Mario Party is the Korean Zombie, this game is the Zorean Kombie.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the fun comparison “Zorean Kombie” really made our team smile! We’re glad the mini-games gave you that classic Mario Party vibe in VR.
We’ll keep working hard to make the experience even more exciting. Thanks for playing MR.TRAVELER!

reviews.review_description:
I enjoy sightseeing wonderful landmark.
but i wish viewing time  was longer.
.😍😍

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We’re so glad you enjoyed sightseeing the landmarks. 😄
We hear you extending the viewing time is a great idea, and we’ll consider it for future updates to make exploring even more enjoyable.
Hope you continue having fun in MR. TRAVELER!

reviews.review_description: For a free game this is quite nice. polished and many stuffs to do. good job.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the kind words!
We’re really glad to hear that you found the game polished and enjoyable, especially as a free title.
We’ll keep adding more fun content and improving the overall experience, so we hope you continue to enjoy MR. TRAVELER!

reviews.review_description: Fun

developer_response.body:
"Fun!
That's the one word our dev team loves to hear… thank you! 😎🎉"

reviews.review_description: The game is so cute that it’s a joy just to look at. It feels exactly like the dice games we played as kids. Simple and fun, it’s perfect for playing with family. Although it’s still in early access, I’m really looking forward to the full release.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the wonderful review!
We’re thrilled to hear that MR. TRAVELER brings back that nostalgic dice game feeling and that you enjoy the cute visuals.
Creating a simple and fun experience for families was exactly what we aimed for, and your feedback means a lot.
We can’t wait to share the full release with you 
Stay tuned and spread the word!

reviews.review_title: This is the best VR board game ever!!
reviews.review_description:
The graphics are so cute and beautiful. The maps are beautiful, and the minigames are fun to play. It's been a while since I've played a fun board game. It's ten times more fun playing with friends! 
Highly recommended!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the amazing review!
We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the visuals, the maps, and the mini-games and even more excited that playing with friends made it 10x more fun! 🎲✨
We’ll keep adding more content to make your board game nights in VR even better.
Thanks for recommending MR.TRAVELER!

reviews.review_description: As a tester, I enjoyed this Korean Game!

developer_response.body: Do you know Faker, BTS, Huntrix and Saja boys? This game is going to be the next big thing in South Korea. Haha😎

reviews.review_title: It was fun, but difficult to use items
reviews.review_description: Rolling the dice was easy, but using items to win was initially challenging. And I wish there were better matchmaking with other players.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the feedback!
We’re glad you enjoyed the dice mechanics, and we’re currently working on making item usage more intuitive for new players.
As for matchmaking, we expect it to improve naturally as more players who enjoy free MR board games join over time.
Your feedback really helps us prioritize what to refine next.
Thanks again for playing MR. TRAVELER we’ll keep polishing the experience!

reviews.review_description: It’s such a great game to play with friends. I love the cute little mini-games, and the animations are adorable — it really feels like going on a little trip.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your review! 😄
We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the cute mini-games and adorable animations, they really do make playing with friends feel like a little trip.
We’ll keep adding more content to MR.TRAVELER to make your journeys even more fun and memorable!

reviews.review_description: Wow! The music,characters,and backgrounds are super cute. it,s such a cozy game. I think it would be really fun to play with others. Hope this game becomes a hit!!

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the warm review!
We’re thrilled that you enjoyed the music, characters, and cozy atmosphere of the game.
When we first planned MR. TRAVELER, we took inspiration from Monopoly GO! and Mario Party, which helped us create artwork and characters that anyone can enjoy.
Multiplayer is a big part of the experience, and we’re continuously working to make playing with others even more fun and seamless.
Thanks again for the kind words we really hope the game becomes a hit too!

reviews.review_title: I enjoy the variety of minigames.
reviews.review_description: I played against a bot this time, but I bet it would be more fun with other players. It was fun

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback!
We’re glad you enjoyed the variety of minigames. 😄
You’re right, playing against other players definitely adds even more fun and excitement.
We’re continuously working to improve multiplayer matchmaking, so we hope you’ll have a chance to experience it soon.
Thanks again for playing MR. TRAVELER!
